Around 150 Mauritians die on our roads every year. Every one of them left home expecting to come back.

This movement is about saving lives. For Rs 100, you make a public commitment to drive responsibly and become a visible part of the change Mauritius needs.

Your Visible Commitment

The Badge Changes Minds Before You Say A Word.

When you display your badge, you push the message to every driver around you.

Why We Built This

Mauritius Needs This. You Can Be Part of the Answer.

👤
Individual Level
Every driver who pledges changes their own behaviour and influences every driver who sees their badge.
🏢
Company Level
A company without a road safety culture carries that risk every day. When your staff sign the pledge, safety becomes part of who you are.
🇲🇺
National Level
Mauritius cannot legislate its way to safe roads. Culture has to change. The pledge is a national social contract, built driver by driver.

"Today you drive with your child in the back seat. Tomorrow, they will be behind the wheel. The road culture you build now is the world they inherit."

The Reality

These Are Not Statistics. They Are Families.

Behind every number is an empty chair, a phone that never rings again, a birthday that now feels like a funeral.

~150
Road fatalities per year on Mauritius roads
#1
Speeding, drunk driving and phone use are the top killers
Rs 100M+
Annual economic cost of road accidents in Mauritius
18–35
Age group most affected, young Mauritians losing their futures

"We spend our lives planning for the future. But a single distracted second can erase it. Why wait for tragedy to be the reason you change?"

For You As A Driver
You make hundreds of decisions every time you drive. Speed. Distance. A glance at your phone. The pledge makes you conscious of every one of them.
For Your Company
Any company operating a fleet carries road safety liability. One serious incident can mean legal exposure, reputational damage, and irreversible human cost.
Simple. Structured. Scalable.

Sign the Pledge

Certificate Sent

5

Print your 9cm vinyl badge and display it.

Join The Movement

Sign The Pledge Today.

"One signature. One badge. One less reason for a family to grieve."

ROAD SAFETY PLEDGE
Africa Development Program Services (ADPS) · Mauritius 2026
"Drive like your family is in the other car."
THE PLEDGE
"Mo pe pran responsibilite." — I take responsibility for every journey I make.
I will always wear my seatbelt and ensure every passenger is secured before I drive.
I will never drive under the influence of alcohol, drugs, or any impairing substance.
I will never use my phone or engage in distracting activity while driving.
I will drive at a safe speed and adjust to road conditions at all times.
I will check my vehicle is roadworthy before every journey.
I will respect pedestrians, cyclists and motorcyclists at all times.
I will be patient and tolerant of other drivers on the road.
I will give immediate way to emergency vehicles.
I commit to being an example of responsible driving for my community.
I understand my actions behind the wheel affect the lives of others.
"Drive like your family is in the other car. You are someone's reason to come home."
Full Name
Signed For (e.g. Family)

Transparency

Where Every Rupee Goes

Every rupee collected is tracked and published. This programme is self-funded by participants.

40%
School Safety Workshops
On-site road safety education with the Police Road Safety Unit.
30%
National Awareness Campaigns
Social media, radio, billboards and community events.
20%
Certificate & Badge
Digital certificate, printable badge file and programme platform.
10%
Operations
Programme management, reporting and coordination.

ADPS may, at its discretion, offer support to families affected by road accidents as a community gesture. This is not guaranteed and does not constitute insurance or any legal obligation.

"Together, let's make Mauritius roads safer."

The ADPS Road Safety Pledge is a voluntary initiative by Africa Development Program Services (ADPS), a private development programme management firm based in Mauritius. Participation does not modify legal liability, constitute insurance, or guarantee any safety outcome. Badge is printable, vinyl sticker, 9cm diameter. New design released each year. © 2026 Africa Development Program Services Limited. All rights reserved.
